HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeffer, Clerk: Felicia Green, Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Jennifer Monsarrett, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Mercy Housing California.
Attorney, Daniel M. Bornstein representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Beatrice E. Hamilton is present.
Attorney, Michelle Glover representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 236 Schwerin Street, San Francisco, California.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-05-2009 is vacated.
